title: Binn Ibes
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Binn Ibes |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{CSWECite|II|Ibes, Binn}} |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]'' *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Reeft]] }} {{Quote|And where's Reeft? The dining hall?''"
"''He was chosen as the Padawan of Binn Ibes. He's off on his first mission.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Bant Eerin/Legends|Bant Eerin]]|}} '''Binn Ibes''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. ==Biography== Binn Ibes was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and understand the Path of the Jedi by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. A contemporary of famed [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], Ibes gained the title of Master as well, at which time he selected the [[Dressellian/Legends|Dressellian]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Reeft]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Reeft would go on to complete his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], completing his training under Ibes and ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ibes, Binn}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
